finishedSize.note: Top panel (6") folds over bottom panel (5") — 1" offset

panelOffset.description: Top panel is 6", bottom panel is 5" — 1" offset

foldLines.label: Fold — 6" from top (1" panel offset, top=6", bottom=5")

surfaces.label: Outside

zones.label: Ink-Free Zone (Address + Postage)
zones.rule: No ink allowed. Must be completely white/blank. Reserved for recipient address and postage indicia.
zones.note: Top panel, 0.15" from fold and 0.275" from right edge

surfaces.llmPrompt:
You are designing the OUTSIDE of an 11×9" bifold self-mailer with a 1" panel offset.

Canvas: 9.25" wide × 11.25" tall (includes 0.125" bleed on all sides).
Trim: 9" × 11" — everything outside this is cut off.
Safe zone: 8.75" × 10.75" (0.125" inset from trim) — ALL text, logos, and critical content must stay inside this boundary.

This piece folds at 6" from top. Top panel = 6", bottom panel = 5" (1" offset — the bottom panel is intentionally shorter so it doesn't stick out when folded). Finished size is 6" × 9".

Zone restrictions:
- INK-FREE ZONE: A 4" × 2.375" rectangle on the top panel, positioned 0.275" from right edge and 0.15" above the fold. Must be COMPLETELY WHITE.

Design tips:
- The top panel is the address side when folded.
- The bottom 1" of the bottom panel is visible when the piece is folded closed — use this for attention-grabbing creative (teaser text, a bold color strip, etc.).
- Extend background colors into the bleed.
- Submit inside artwork upright — printer inverts during production.

surfaces.label: Inside

zones.label: Glue Zone
zones.rule: Adhesive is applied here to seal the mailer. Artwork CAN be placed here but may be obscured or damaged when opened. Avoid critical content.

zones.label: Visible When Closed
zones.rule: This 1" strip at the bottom of the inside is visible when the piece is folded. Use for teaser content or attention-grabbing design.

surfaces.llmPrompt:
You are designing the INSIDE of an 11×9" bifold self-mailer with a 1" panel offset.

Canvas: 9.25" wide × 11.25" tall (includes 0.125" bleed on all sides).
Trim: 9" × 11".
Safe zone: 8.75" × 10.75" (0.125" inset from trim).

This piece folds at 6" from top (top=6", bottom=5"). The inside is revealed when opened.

Zone restrictions:
- GLUE ZONE: A ~0.375" strip near the bottom of the inside panel (above the visible-when-closed area). Artwork CAN go here but may be damaged on opening.
- VISIBLE WHEN CLOSED: The bottom ~1.125" of the inside is visible when the mailer is folded closed (due to the 1" panel offset). This is a bonus design area — use it for teaser text or attention-grabbing creative to encourage opening.

Design tips:
- Both panels are fully customizable except for the glue strip.
- The visible-when-closed strip is a unique opportunity — design something compelling to encourage recipients to open.
- Design upright — printer inverts during production.
- Merge variables like {{name}} can be used anywhere.

notes: 1" panel offset — bottom panel shorter, creating visible strip when closed.
Submit inside artwork upright — printer inverts during production.
